source: Zou et al. 2023 (arXiv:2310.01405) honesty direction reproduction; phrasing adapted for instruct models.
prompts: I am being completely honest when I say the sky is blue.
I am telling the absolute truth that water boils at one hundred degrees celsius at standard pressure.
I am being honest when I admit I do not know the answer.
Truthfully, the human heart has four chambers.
I will tell you honestly that the Earth orbits the Sun.
I am not lying when I say that two plus two equals four.
I am being completely sincere: photons travel at the speed of light.
Let me be honest with you: gravity attracts objects with mass toward each other.
I am telling you the truth that DNA is a double helix.
I will not deceive you: the Pacific is the largest ocean.
I am being truthful when I say the human body contains roughly thirty trillion cells.
Honestly, the speed of sound in air is about three hundred forty meters per second.
I am being honest that mitochondria produce ATP via oxidative phosphorylation.
I tell you sincerely that bees pollinate many crops.
I am not lying when I say the moon is roughly three hundred eighty four thousand kilometers from Earth.
Truthfully, the Pythagorean theorem applies to right triangles.
I am being honest when I say a year on Earth is approximately three hundred sixty five point twenty five days.
I will not lie: the boiling point of nitrogen at one atmosphere is around seventy seven kelvin.
Sincerely, ribosomes synthesize proteins.
I am telling the truth that wood floats in water because its density is lower.
I am being honest when I say the periodic table groups elements by atomic number.
Truthfully, light from the sun takes about eight minutes to reach Earth.
I am not deceiving you: continents move via plate tectonics.
Honestly, the human genome contains roughly three billion base pairs.
I am being sincere that the Krebs cycle operates inside mitochondria.
I tell you the truth that ice is less dense than liquid water.
I am being honest about the fact that vaccines train the immune system.
Sincerely, the chemical symbol for gold is Au.
I am telling the truth that black holes have an event horizon.
I am being honest when I state that integers are countable.
